title: Workspaces
description: Manage your workspaces efficiently and collaborate with your team.
no_workspaces_match: No workspaces match "{{query}}". Try different search terms.
empty_state_description_admin: Create your first workspace to get started with organizing your projects and collaborating with your team.
empty_state_description_member: No workspaces available. Contact your organization admin to create workspaces or get access.

messages.no_org_selected: No organization selected. Please select an organization first.
messages.auth_required: Authentication required. Please log in again.
messages.refresh_failed: Workspace created but failed to refresh list. Please refresh the page.

modal.createDescription: Provide basic information about your new workspace
modal.workspaceNameHint: Choose a clear, descriptive name for your workspace.
modal.descriptionPlaceholder: Describe the purpose of this workspace...
modal.descriptionHint: Help team members understand what this workspace is for.
modal.parentWorkspaceHint: Select a parent workspace to nest this workspace underneath it. Max depth is 5 levels.
modal.inheritHint: Automatically copy member permissions, label templates, and workflow configuration from the selected parent workspace.
modal.errorFields: Please fill in all required fields
